headline: Lennar Opens Tuxedo Reserve As Margins Tighten And Valuation Lags
summary: Lennar (NYSE:LEN) has opened Tuxedo Reserve, a new master-planned community in New York's Hudson Valley. The community is beginning move ins and preparing to unveil model homes, with a mix of single-family homes and townhomes. The project includes plans for a future walkable town center and shared amenities for residents. Lennar, trading at $90.49, is adding Tuxedo Reserve to its portfolio as a large scale community in a high-demand region. The stock is down 13.2% year to date and down...

headline: Berkshire Hathaway (BRK.B): A Bill Gates-Backed Stock Expanding Its Housing Bet With Taylor Morrison Deal
summary: Berkshire Hathaway B (NYSE:BRK.B) is one of the best stocks to buy according to billionaire Bill Gates. Berkshire Hathaway stock is backed by 130 hedge funds. Analysts see at least a 13% upside in Berkshire shares from the current level. On May 31, Berkshire Hathaway B (NYSE:BRK.B) said it would acquire homebuilder Taylor Morrison Home […]
